## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case, not the implementation. What can't you do today, or what's awkward?

## Proposed API or behavior

(Optional — sketch what you'd like the call site or event shape to look like.)

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've tried, and why they don't quite work.
